name: 金属键
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 结构 2 · 化学键与结构 Structure 2 · The Molecular World
curriculum_points: Describe the metallic bond as the electrostatic attraction between a lattice of positive ions and delocalized electrons, and use this model to explain the typical physical properties of metals, such as malleability, ductility, and electrical and thermal conductivity (AO2).
Explain the trends in melting points of metals across a period and down a group in terms of the strength of the metallic bond, relating it to ionic radius and charge (AO3).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「金属键」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Describe the metallic bond as the electrostatic attraction between a lattice of positive ions and delocalized electrons,…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Explain the trends in melting points of metals across a period and down a group … 对理解「金属键」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
